google_analytics.note: Updated Mar 9 — all engagement metrics trending up vs previous period. MV dashboard down, using last MV measurement.

latest_measurement.notes: RPM $8.81 (Q1 seasonal). GA engagement improving: pages/session 1.459→1.474, duration 307→312.5s, engagement 64.6%→65.5%. Sidebar Sticky deployed and serving Mediavine ads. MV dashboard intermittently down.

completed_optimizations.name: mediavine_cdn_preconnect
completed_optimizations.description: Added preconnect and dns-prefetch hints for scripts.mediavine.com and cdn.mediavine.com to app/layout.tsx <head>
completed_optimizations.metric_target: ad viewability / ad load speed (CPM improvement)
completed_optimizations.notes: Added 4 link tags: preconnect + dns-prefetch for both scripts.mediavine.com and cdn.mediavine.com. Placed before Google Fonts preconnect for priority. Build verified clean.

completed_optimizations.name: mediavine_cdn_preconnect_wordpress
completed_optimizations.description: Added same Mediavine CDN preconnect hints to WordPress blog via functions.php wp_head hook (priority 1)
completed_optimizations.metric_target: ad viewability / ad load speed on blog pages (80% of revenue)
completed_optimizations.notes: Pushed to both staging and prod via push scripts. Verified preconnect tags present in HTML source. BigScoots cache purged.

completed_optimizations.name: revert_font_size_modfinder
completed_optimizations.description: Reverted 18px font-size on mod finder — wrong optimization for a grid/browse UI. Blog already had 18px.
completed_optimizations.notes: Font size optimization is a blog pattern (long reading), not a mod finder pattern (grid scanning). Blog already has 18px via functions.php CSS.

completed_optimizations.name: remove_image_unoptimized
completed_optimizations.description: Removed unoptimized flag from Image components on mod detail page
completed_optimizations.metric_target: page load speed → ad viewability on mod detail pages
completed_optimizations.notes: Enables Next.js image optimization pipeline. Faster image loading = ads render in viewport sooner = higher viewability.

completed_optimizations.name: related_mods_section
completed_optimizations.description: Added Related Mods section to mod detail pages (6 mods, same category + gameVersion)
completed_optimizations.notes: Displays 6 related mods in 3-column grid with thumbnails, ratings, price badges. API uses Prisma with HOT cache tier (60s TTL).

completed_optimizations.name: expand_mod_detail_content
completed_optimizations.description: Added installation guide, compatibility info, and FAQ sections to mod detail pages
completed_optimizations.hypothesis: Adding 3 H2 sections (Install, Compatibility, FAQ) creates 3 additional Mediavine Script Wrapper ad insertion points per mod detail page. ~40% more scroll depth. Game-specific content for Sims 4, Minecraft, Stardew Valley.
completed_optimizations.notes: New component ModContentSections.tsx. Collapsible FAQ items. Game-aware content (different install steps per game). No gradients. Build passes clean.

completed_optimizations.name: mod_page_jsonld_and_breadcrumb_schema
completed_optimizations.description: Added SoftwareApplication + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD structured data to mod detail pages
completed_optimizations.metric_target: search CTR improvement → more organic traffic → more pageviews → more ad revenue
completed_optimizations.hypothesis: SoftwareApplication schema enables rich snippets (ratings, price, author) in Google SERPs. BreadcrumbList shows navigation path. Both improve CTR from search results, driving more organic traffic. Effect takes 2-4 weeks as Google re-crawls pages.
completed_optimizations.notes: New component ModJsonLd.tsx renders two JSON-LD script tags. Uses SoftwareApplication (not Article) since mods are software. Includes aggregateRating when ratings exist. BreadcrumbList covers Home > Category > Mod. Build passes clean.

completed_optimizations.name: restore_sidebar_sticky_ads
completed_optimizations.description: Restored sidebar visibility on single blog posts (desktop) for Mediavine Sidebar Sticky ad unit
completed_optimizations.hypothesis: The dark theme CSS hid sidebar on all page types, killing Sidebar Sticky ad unit. Re-enabling sidebar on desktop single posts (where users read long content) will restore the sticky ad that auto-refreshes every 30s. Expected recovery: ~$900/month. May also improve overall viewability since sidebar sticky typically has highest viewability of any ad unit.

implementation.approach: PHP server-side injection via get_sidebar WordPress action hook. Outputs bare <aside id='secondary' class='widget-area primary-sidebar'> element. CSS at priority 100010 overrides all display:none rules with html body.single specificity. Flex layout: main content + 300px sticky sidebar.
key_learnings: Perfmatters plugin rewrites inline <script> tags to type='pmdelayedscript', preventing execution. Solution: use PHP HTML output instead of JS injection.
BigScoots purge_all() is async/incomplete — use purge_urls() for specific URLs or purge_all() + purge_opcache() + purge_object_cache() together.
Mediavine Script Wrapper auto-detects <aside id='secondary'> with class='widget-area' — no need to email Mediavine for retargeting.
Three cache layers on BigScoots: WP object cache (wp cache flush), Perfmatters HTML cache (rm -rf wp-content/cache/perfmatters/), BigScoots edge cache (purge_all/purge_urls).

completed_optimizations.verification: Confirmed via browser-use: #secondary element visible (display:block, width:300px, position:sticky), Mediavine Grow.me 'Recommended' widget + display ads auto-injected. Sidebar sticks on scroll.

completed_optimizations.name: more_from_creator_section
completed_optimizations.description: Added More from Creator section to mod detail pages (up to 6 mods by same author)
completed_optimizations.hypothesis: Users who find one mod from a creator will browse more by the same creator. Adds another internal linking surface + H2 section for Mediavine ad insertion. Placed between ModContentSections and RelatedMods for optimal scroll depth.
completed_optimizations.notes: New component MoreFromCreator.tsx with same card design as RelatedMods. API uses Prisma HOT cache (60s TTL). Hidden when creator has no other mods. Build passes clean.

completed_optimizations.name: trending_mods_carousel
completed_optimizations.description: Added Trending Mods horizontal carousel to homepage showing top 12 mods by download count
completed_optimizations.hypothesis: Trending Mods carousel on homepage gives users immediate discovery paths, increasing click-through to mod detail pages. Each additional pageview = more ad impressions. Only shows on default homepage (no active filters/search). Drives pages/session and session duration.
completed_optimizations.notes: New component TrendingMods.tsx. Horizontal scroll with chevron nav buttons. Fetches from existing /api/mods endpoint (sortBy=downloadCount, limit=12). Dark theme cards with thumbnail, price badge, game badge, rating, author. Loading skeleton state. No gradients. Build passes clean.

pending_optimizations.name: desktop_right_sidebar_ad
pending_optimizations.description: Add sticky right sidebar ad container on desktop homepage
pending_optimizations.impact: new high-value ad slot on desktop (85% of search traffic)

pending_optimizations.name: email_mediavine_retarget_sidebar
pending_optimizations.notes: Mediavine Script Wrapper auto-detected <aside id='secondary'> and immediately started serving Sidebar Sticky + Grow.me Recommended widget. No manual retargeting email needed.

mediavine_settings_audit.video_settings: ALL OPTIMAL — Universal Player ON (desktop+mobile), Mid-Roll ON, Optimize placement ON
mediavine_settings_audit.ad_settings: ALL OPTIMAL — CWV optimization ON, PageSpeed ON (mobile+desktop), CLS optimization ON
mediavine_settings_audit.ad_units: MOSTLY OPTIMAL — Adhesion ON all devices, Sidebar ON, Leaderboard ON, GumGum ON. OPPORTUNITIES: Interstitial Ads OFF (mobile+desktop), Ad Block Recovery OFF
mediavine_settings_audit.recommendations: Enable Ad Block Recovery (zero risk, +2-5% revenue), consider enabling Interstitial Ads (+5-10% RPM but slightly worse UX)
